metadata.onet_source: O*NET Online (US Department of Labor) - Management Occupations (SOC 11-XXXX)
metadata.note: Skills, education levels, and experience ranges for ADM-series jobs are enriched from O*NET data. Salary ranges are India-specific (INR).

jobs.title: Associate Product Manager
jobs.description: Entry-level product role focused on supporting senior PMs in research, documentation, and feature scoping for digital products.
roles_responsibilities: Assist in defining product requirements and user stories
Conduct market and user research
Coordinate with engineering and design teams
Track and report on feature development progress
Analyze product metrics and prepare reports
jobs.future_scope: APMs typically graduate to full PM roles within 2 years. Strong demand from startups and product-led companies.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Define product vision, prioritize features, and coordinate cross-functional teams to build and deliver successful digital products.
roles_responsibilities: Define product roadmap and strategy
Gather and analyze user requirements
Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams
Prioritize features based on business impact
Track product performance and iterate
jobs.future_scope: Product management roles are expanding rapidly as companies focus on building user-centric products.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.description: Lead product strategy for complex product lines, mentor junior PMs, and drive cross-org alignment on multi-quarter roadmaps.
roles_responsibilities: Own end-to-end product lifecycle for key product areas
Define OKRs and success metrics
Influence executive stakeholders
Mentor APMs and PMs
Drive go-to-market strategy with marketing and sales
jobs.future_scope: Pathway to Group PM, Director of Product, or VP of Product. Senior PMs are among the most sought-after roles in tech.

jobs.title: Group Product Manager
jobs.description: Oversee a portfolio of products or a major product area, managing a team of PMs and aligning product strategy with company goals.
roles_responsibilities: Manage and mentor a team of Product Managers
Own product portfolio strategy and roadmap
Align product vision with business strategy
Present to C-level stakeholders
Drive cross-functional collaboration across multiple teams

alternative: 8+ Years PM Experience with Leadership Track

jobs.future_scope: Direct pathway to Director of Product or VP Product. Highly valuable in product-led growth companies.

jobs.title: Director of Product Management
jobs.description: Lead the entire product function for a business unit, setting product culture, strategy, and building high-performing PM teams.
roles_responsibilities: Define product vision and multi-year strategy
Build and scale PM organization
Partner with CTO, CEO, and CMO on company direction
Manage Group PMs and set performance standards
Drive product-market fit and revenue growth

alternative: 10+ Years in Product with Senior Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: Pathway to VP of Product, Chief Product Officer (CPO), or founding a startup.

jobs.title: VP of Product
jobs.description: Executive responsible for all product lines, representing product at the board level and aligning product investments with company strategy.
roles_responsibilities: Set company-wide product strategy
Represent product to board and investors
Manage Directors and Group PMs
Define product culture and hiring bar
Drive revenue and growth through product

preferred: MBA from IIM/ISB or Top Global School
alternative: Proven Track Record as Director of Product

jobs.future_scope: Pathway to CPO or CEO. VPs of Product are highly compensated and frequently sought by funded startups.

jobs.title: Chief Product Officer (CPO)
jobs.description: The top product executive in an organization, accountable for all product decisions, innovation, and the product P&L.
roles_responsibilities: Own entire product portfolio and vision
Drive product-led growth
Align product with business, tech, and marketing
Represent product on the executive leadership team
Set innovation agenda and build product culture

alternative: Proven CPO / VP Product Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Top of the product career ladder. Potential pivot to CEO or startup founder.

jobs.title: Product Analyst
jobs.description: Supports product teams with data analysis, user behavior insights, A/B test analysis, and dashboards to drive product decisions.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze product usage data and user behavior
Build dashboards and reports for PM teams
Design and analyze A/B experiments
Identify growth opportunities through data
Work with engineering to ensure data instrumentation
jobs.future_scope: Strong transition path to Product Manager, Data Scientist, or Growth Analyst roles.

jobs.title: Technical Product Manager
jobs.description: A PM with deep technical expertise who manages APIs, infrastructure products, developer tools, or platform products requiring close engineering collaboration.
roles_responsibilities: Define technical requirements and system design trade-offs
Work closely with architects and engineers
Manage platform, API, or infrastructure product roadmaps
Translate business needs into technical specifications
Conduct technical feasibility assessments
jobs.future_scope: High demand in SaaS, fintech, and platform companies. Strong career growth to Senior TPM or Engineering Director.

jobs.title: Growth Product Manager
jobs.description: Focuses on user acquisition, activation, retention, and monetization through rapid experimentation and data-driven product changes.
roles_responsibilities: Own growth metrics: DAU, MAU, retention, conversion
Run rapid A/B tests across the funnel
Collaborate with marketing and data teams
Identify and prioritize growth levers
Build self-serve and viral growth loops

alternative: Demonstrated Growth Results in Prior Role

jobs.future_scope: Growth PM is one of the most in-demand niches in product, especially in B2C and SaaS companies.

jobs.title: Project Coordinator
jobs.description: Supports project managers in planning, scheduling, tracking, and reporting on project activities across teams.
roles_responsibilities: Maintain project schedules and timelines
Coordinate meetings and documentation
Track project milestones and deliverables
Assist in resource allocation
Communicate status updates to stakeholders
jobs.future_scope: Clear pathway to Project Manager and eventually PMP-certified Senior PM.

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.description: Plan, execute, monitor, and close projects on time, within scope and budget across industries including IT, construction, consulting, and manufacturing.
roles_responsibilities: Define project scope, goals, and deliverables
Develop and manage project plans and schedules
Manage project budget and resources
Identify and mitigate risks
Communicate with stakeholders and report progress
jobs.future_scope: Project management is universally needed across industries — IT, construction, consulting, healthcare, and government.

jobs.title: Senior Project Manager
jobs.description: Manages large, complex, multi-team projects with significant budget responsibility and senior stakeholder engagement.
roles_responsibilities: Lead large-scale projects with cross-functional teams
Manage multi-crore project budgets
Drive executive stakeholder communication
Mentor junior PMs
Establish PMO practices and standards
jobs.future_scope: Progresses to Program Manager, Portfolio Manager, or PMO Lead roles.

jobs.title: Program Manager
jobs.description: Oversees a portfolio of related projects to ensure they are aligned with business strategy and delivered cohesively.
roles_responsibilities: Manage interdependencies across multiple projects
Align program goals with organizational strategy
Govern program-level budget and timelines
Lead program steering committees
Drive organizational change management
jobs.future_scope: Pathway to PMO Director, Portfolio Manager, or Operations VP.

jobs.title: PMO Manager (Project Management Office Manager)
jobs.description: Establishes and manages the Project Management Office, setting standards, governance, and methodologies for project delivery across an organization.
roles_responsibilities: Define and enforce PM standards and methodologies
Maintain project portfolio visibility for leadership
Train and coach project managers
Track portfolio-level KPIs and performance
Support resource capacity planning

alternative: 10+ Years PM Experience in Governance Roles

jobs.future_scope: PMO Managers are critical in large enterprises. Pathway to Director of PMO or Chief of Staff.

jobs.title: Scrum Master
jobs.description: Facilitates Agile/Scrum ceremonies, removes impediments, and coaches teams to self-organize and continuously improve delivery.
roles_responsibilities: Facilitate sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives
Remove team impediments and blockers
Coach teams on Agile principles
Track and report sprint velocity and burndown
Protect team from scope creep and distractions
jobs.future_scope: Strong demand in IT and product companies. Career path toward Agile Coach, RTE (Release Train Engineer), or PM.

jobs.title: Agile Coach
jobs.description: An experienced Agile practitioner who coaches multiple teams and leadership on adopting and scaling Agile practices across the organization.
roles_responsibilities: Coach leadership and teams on Agile mindset
Drive Agile transformation programs
Scale Agile using SAFe, LeSS, or Spotify model
Conduct Agile maturity assessments
Train and certify Scrum Masters and PMs
jobs.future_scope: High demand in large enterprises undergoing digital transformation. Can move into Director of Delivery or Consulting.

jobs.title: IT Project Manager
jobs.description: Manages technology-specific projects including software development, infrastructure rollouts, ERP implementations, and digital transformation initiatives.
roles_responsibilities: Manage IT project scope, budget, and timelines
Coordinate with development, QA, and infrastructure teams
Handle vendor and third-party management
Drive SDLC compliance and release management
Manage change requests and escalations
jobs.future_scope: IT PMs are in high demand across BFSI, IT services, and enterprise sectors. Growth path to Program Manager.

jobs.title: Operations Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level operations role supporting day-to-day business processes, process documentation, and operational reporting.
roles_responsibilities: Support daily operational activities
Maintain operational records and reports
Coordinate with internal departments
Monitor process adherence
Assist in process improvement initiatives
jobs.future_scope: Foundation for moving into operations analyst, team lead, or supply chain roles.

jobs.title: Operations Manager
jobs.description: Oversees daily business operations, manages teams, drives process improvements, and ensures efficiency and quality across the organization.
roles_responsibilities: Manage day-to-day operations and team performance
Identify and implement process improvements
Manage budgets and operational costs
Ensure SLA and KPI compliance
Coordinate with cross-functional teams

alternative: 5+ Years in Operations or Relevant Domain

jobs.future_scope: Operations managers are in demand across all industries. Growth path to Director of Operations or COO.

jobs.title: Senior Operations Manager
jobs.description: Leads operations strategy for a business unit, manages large teams, and drives significant cost efficiency and quality improvements.
roles_responsibilities: Lead operations strategy and transformation
Manage large teams (50+)
Drive cost reduction and efficiency programs
Present to senior leadership and board
Manage multiple operational functions simultaneously
jobs.future_scope: Moves into VP Operations or COO tracks. High value in manufacturing, logistics, and BFSI sectors.

jobs.title: Director of Operations
jobs.description: Senior executive responsible for the entire operational efficiency of an organization or large business unit, reporting to COO or CEO.
roles_responsibilities: Define and execute operational strategy
Manage P&L for operations division
Lead organizational restructuring and transformation
Manage vendor and partner relationships
Set KPIs and operational standards company-wide
jobs.future_scope: Direct pathway to COO. Highly valued in manufacturing, retail, logistics, and financial services.

jobs.title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
jobs.description: The second-highest executive in an organization, responsible for overseeing daily operations, aligning teams, and executing on the CEO's vision.
roles_responsibilities: Oversee all business operations
Implement CEO's strategic vision operationally
Manage cross-functional department heads
Drive operational efficiency and growth
Represent operations at board level

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Global Top 20
alternative: Proven Record as Director / VP Operations

jobs.future_scope: Top of operations career ladder. COOs often transition to CEO roles.

jobs.title: Business Process Manager
jobs.description: Designs, documents, analyzes, and improves business processes to enhance efficiency, reduce waste, and ensure compliance.
roles_responsibilities: Map and document current business processes (As-Is)
Design optimized future-state processes (To-Be)
Lead process improvement initiatives using Lean / Six Sigma
Develop process KPIs and monitoring frameworks
Train teams on new processes
jobs.future_scope: Strong in consulting, BFSI, and IT services. Path to Senior BPM or Operations Director.

jobs.title: Quality Manager
jobs.description: Ensures products and services meet quality standards through audits, QMS implementation, and continuous improvement programs.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain Quality Management Systems (ISO 9001, etc.)
Conduct internal and external quality audits
Lead root cause analysis and corrective actions
Train staff on quality standards and procedures
Report quality metrics to leadership
jobs.future_scope: Critical in manufacturing, pharma, automotive, and IT services. Path to VP Quality or Director of Quality.

jobs.title: Marketing Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level role supporting marketing campaigns, social media, content, and market research activities.
roles_responsibilities: Execute marketing campaigns across channels
Manage social media profiles and content calendar
Assist in market research and competitor analysis
Coordinate with creative and content teams
Track campaign performance metrics
jobs.future_scope: Clear path to Marketing Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, or Brand Manager within 2-3 years.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Leads marketing strategy and execution across channels — digital, offline, and brand — to drive awareness and revenue growth.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute integrated marketing plans
Manage marketing budget and ROI
Lead a team of marketing executives
Oversee brand communication and positioning
Analyze campaign performance and optimize

alternative: 5+ Years in Marketing with Demonstrated Results

jobs.future_scope: Broad demand across all industries. Career path to Senior Marketing Manager, VP Marketing, or CMO.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Leads all digital marketing initiatives including SEO, paid ads, email marketing, content, and social media to drive online growth.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and execute digital campaigns (SEO, SEM, social, email)
Manage digital marketing budget and agency partners
Analyze web traffic, conversions, and user behavior
Oversee content strategy and SEO
Drive lead generation and customer acquisition
jobs.future_scope: Digital-first economy means enormous demand. Path to Growth Lead, VP Marketing, or CMO.

jobs.title: Brand Manager
jobs.description: Manages brand identity, positioning, and equity across all touchpoints to build a consistent and compelling brand in the market.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute brand strategy
Manage brand guidelines and visual identity
Coordinate with agencies for brand campaigns
Conduct brand health tracking and consumer research
Manage product launches and brand extensions
jobs.future_scope: High demand in FMCG, BFSI, and e-commerce. Growth path to Senior Brand Manager or VP Brand.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Develops and executes a content strategy that drives brand awareness, engagement, and inbound lead generation across digital channels.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and own the content strategy
Manage content calendar across blogs, social, video, email
Oversee a team of writers and content creators
Optimize content for SEO
Measure content performance and ROI
jobs.future_scope: Content-led growth is a dominant strategy. Path to Head of Content, VP Marketing.

jobs.title: VP of Marketing
jobs.description: Senior executive driving company-wide marketing strategy, managing large teams and budgets, and accountable for brand and revenue growth.
roles_responsibilities: Define and execute go-to-market strategy
Own marketing P&L
Manage marketing department across channels
Drive brand equity and market share growth
Report marketing performance to CEO and board
jobs.future_scope: Pathway to CMO. High compensation, especially in tech, FMCG, and D2C companies.

jobs.title: Chief Marketing Officer (CMO)
jobs.description: The highest marketing executive, responsible for brand, growth, demand generation, and customer experience strategy at the company level.
roles_responsibilities: Set the company's overall marketing vision
Drive brand equity and customer acquisition strategy
Own marketing budget and revenue attribution
Represent marketing at board and investor level
Lead and mentor VP-level marketing leaders

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Global Top 20

jobs.future_scope: Top of marketing career. Potential move to CEO or Board Advisor.

jobs.title: HR Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level HR role responsible for recruitment support, onboarding, payroll processing, and employee record management.
roles_responsibilities: Assist in recruitment and interview scheduling
Manage employee onboarding and documentation
Handle payroll and attendance records
Resolve basic employee queries
Maintain HRMS data
jobs.future_scope: Foundation for specializing in recruitment, L&D, compensation, or generalist HR roles.

jobs.title: HR Manager
jobs.description: Manages HR operations including talent acquisition, performance management, employee relations, and policy implementation.
roles_responsibilities: Lead end-to-end recruitment for key positions
Manage performance appraisal cycles
Implement HR policies and ensure compliance
Handle employee relations and grievances
Drive employee engagement initiatives

alternative: 5+ Years in HR with Demonstrated Results

jobs.future_scope: HR Managers are needed across all industries. Growth path to Senior HR Manager, HRBP, or HR Director.

jobs.title: HR Business Partner (HRBP)
jobs.description: Acts as a strategic HR advisor to business unit leaders, aligning HR strategy with business goals and driving people-centric outcomes.
roles_responsibilities: Partner with business leaders on people strategy
Drive workforce planning and talent management
Lead organizational design initiatives
Handle complex employee relations issues
Use HR analytics to inform business decisions

alternative: 8+ Years in HR with Business Partnering Experience

jobs.future_scope: HRBPs are among the most valued HR professionals in large organizations. Path to HR Director or CHRO.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Manager
jobs.description: Leads the organization's hiring strategy, employer branding, and recruitment team to attract and hire top talent at scale.
roles_responsibilities: Build and execute talent acquisition strategy
Manage a team of recruiters
Drive employer branding initiatives
Manage campus and lateral hiring pipelines
Track and improve recruitment metrics (TTH, quality of hire)
jobs.future_scope: High demand in IT, e-commerce, and startups. Growth path to Head of TA or CHRO.

jobs.title: Learning & Development Manager
jobs.description: Designs and drives employee learning programs, leadership development, and organizational capability building.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct training needs assessments
Design and deliver learning programs
Manage LMS and e-learning content
Drive leadership development programs
Measure training effectiveness and ROI
jobs.future_scope: Growing importance in skills-based organizations. Path to Head of L&D or Chief Learning Officer.

jobs.title: Compensation & Benefits Manager
jobs.description: Designs, manages, and benchmarks compensation structures, benefits programs, and rewards strategies to attract and retain talent.
roles_responsibilities: Design and administer compensation structures
Conduct compensation benchmarking surveys
Manage employee benefits programs (insurance, PF, ESOP)
Ensure payroll accuracy and statutory compliance
Provide compensation analysis to HR leadership
jobs.future_scope: Specialized and high-value role. Path to Total Rewards Director or CHRO.

jobs.title: Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO)
jobs.description: The top HR executive in an organization, responsible for people strategy, culture, talent, and organizational development at the company level.
roles_responsibilities: Define people strategy aligned to business goals
Build and manage organizational culture
Lead all HR functions: TA, L&D, C&B, ER, HRBP
Report to CEO and board on people metrics
Drive DEI, succession planning, and leadership development

alternative: Proven Track Record as HR Director / VP HR

jobs.future_scope: Top of HR career ladder. CHROs are increasingly joining boards and advisory positions.

jobs.title: Finance Executive / Accounts Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level finance role handling bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, reconciliation, and basic financial reporting.
roles_responsibilities: Maintain books of accounts
Process invoices and payments
Bank reconciliation and ledger management
Assist in preparation of financial statements
Ensure GST and TDS compliance
jobs.future_scope: Foundation for moving into financial analysis, cost accounting, or audit tracks.

jobs.title: Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Analyzes financial data, builds models, and provides insights to support business decision-making, planning, and investment analysis.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain financial models
Analyze financial statements and business performance
Support budgeting and forecasting processes
Prepare management reports and dashboards
Assist in investment analysis and valuations
jobs.future_scope: Excellent path into investment banking, corporate finance, FP&A, or CFO track.

jobs.title: Finance Manager
jobs.description: Oversees financial operations, reporting, budgeting, and compliance, providing strategic financial guidance to business leadership.
roles_responsibilities: Manage financial planning and analysis (FP&A)
Oversee accounting and reporting teams
Lead budget preparation and variance analysis
Ensure statutory and tax compliance
Provide financial insights to management

alternative: 7+ Years in Finance with Supervisory Experience

jobs.future_scope: Core corporate finance role. Path to Senior Finance Manager, VP Finance, or CFO.

jobs.title: Senior Finance Manager / Head of Finance
jobs.description: Leads the finance function for a business unit or mid-sized company, owning P&L, treasury, compliance, and financial strategy.
roles_responsibilities: Own P&L and financial health of the business unit
Lead treasury and cash flow management
Drive cost optimization programs
Manage statutory audits and regulatory compliance
Present financials to board and leadership
jobs.future_scope: Pathway to VP Finance or CFO. Extremely high demand in funded startups and large enterprises.

jobs.title: VP Finance
jobs.description: Senior finance executive overseeing all financial functions, investor relations, fundraising strategy, and financial risk management.
roles_responsibilities: Lead all finance functions across the organization
Manage investor relations and fundraising
Drive M&A due diligence and financial structuring
Present financials at board and investor meetings
Set financial controls and governance frameworks
jobs.future_scope: Clear path to CFO. VPs of Finance are critical in scaling startups and public companies.

jobs.title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)
jobs.description: The top financial executive, responsible for financial strategy, risk management, capital allocation, and representing the company to investors.
roles_responsibilities: Own company-wide financial strategy
Manage fundraising, IPO, and investor relations
Oversee all finance, accounting, tax, and treasury functions
Represent company to board, auditors, and regulators
Drive M&A strategy and execution

alternative: Proven VP Finance / Finance Director Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Top of finance career. CFOs often transition to CEO or board positions.

jobs.title: FP&A Manager (Financial Planning & Analysis)
jobs.description: Leads budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling to support strategic business planning and management decision-making.
roles_responsibilities: Lead annual budgeting and quarterly forecasting
Build and maintain financial models
Analyze actuals vs. budget and present variance analysis
Support strategic planning and scenario analysis
Develop financial dashboards for leadership
jobs.future_scope: FP&A is a high-value specialization. Path to Finance Director or VP Finance.

jobs.title: Management Trainee
jobs.description: Rotational entry-level management program that exposes graduates to multiple business functions before placement into a core management role.
roles_responsibilities: Rotate across business functions (finance, ops, marketing, HR)
Work on live business projects
Present findings to senior management
Learn business operations and culture
Assist in analysis and reporting
jobs.future_scope: Gateway to fast-track management careers in large corporates like Unilever, HUL, Tata, ITC.

jobs.title: Business Analyst
jobs.description: Bridges the gap between business needs and technology/process solutions through analysis, requirements gathering, and process improvement.
roles_responsibilities: Gather and document business requirements
Analyze business processes and identify gaps
Propose and design process / system solutions
Facilitate workshops with stakeholders
Create functional specs and user stories
jobs.future_scope: Versatile role that transitions into PM, Consulting, Product, or Data Analytics tracks.

jobs.title: Strategy Manager
jobs.description: Develops and drives strategic initiatives, market analysis, and business planning to position the company for sustainable competitive advantage.
roles_responsibilities: Lead strategic planning and execution
Conduct competitive and market landscape analysis
Support CEO/leadership on strategic decisions
Build business cases for new initiatives
Track strategy execution and KPIs

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Top Global School

jobs.future_scope: High-prestige role. Path to Director Strategy, VP Strategy, or CSO.

jobs.title: Management Consultant
jobs.description: Advises client organizations on strategy, operations, finance, and technology to solve complex business problems and drive transformation.
roles_responsibilities: Diagnose client business problems
Develop and present strategic recommendations
Lead project workstreams in consulting engagements
Build financial models and business cases
Manage client relationships

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Top Tier

jobs.future_scope: Consulting is a highly respected and well-compensated career. Path to Partner or CSO in corporates.

jobs.title: Chief of Staff
jobs.description: Trusted operational right-hand to the CEO or a senior executive, managing strategic priorities, cross-functional projects, and executive communication.
roles_responsibilities: Manage CEO/executive's strategic priorities
Drive cross-functional initiatives on behalf of leadership
Prepare board presentations and leadership communications
Facilitate leadership team meetings and decision-making
Act as liaison between leadership and functional teams
jobs.future_scope: Highly sought after in startups and corporates. Pathway to VP, GM, or co-founder track.

jobs.title: General Manager (GM)
jobs.description: Responsible for the overall management of a business unit, division, or P&L segment, integrating strategy, operations, and people leadership.
roles_responsibilities: Own P&L for the business unit
Set business goals and strategy
Manage cross-functional teams (sales, ops, finance, marketing)
Drive growth and profitability
Report to CEO / Business Head

alternative: 15+ Years in Domain with P&L Experience

jobs.future_scope: GMs often transition into CEO, MD, or Business Head roles.

jobs.title: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)
jobs.description: The highest-ranking executive in an organization, responsible for overall vision, strategy, culture, and performance of the company.
roles_responsibilities: Set company vision, mission, and culture
Drive business strategy and growth
Manage the executive leadership team
Report to the board of directors
Lead fundraising, M&A, and external partnerships

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Top Global Institute
alternative: Proven entrepreneurial or C-suite track record

jobs.future_scope: Top of the corporate career ladder. Pathway to board member, serial entrepreneur, or investor.

jobs.title: Supply Chain Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level supply chain role supporting procurement, logistics coordination, inventory tracking, and vendor communication.
roles_responsibilities: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers
Track inventory and stock levels
Support procurement activities and purchase orders
Assist in logistics planning and dispatch
Maintain supply chain records and MIS
jobs.future_scope: Entry point into procurement, logistics, demand planning, or SCM analytics tracks.

jobs.title: Procurement Manager
jobs.description: Manages strategic sourcing, vendor negotiations, and purchasing to ensure cost-effective procurement of goods and services.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute procurement strategy
Negotiate contracts and pricing with vendors
Manage vendor evaluation and selection
Ensure procurement compliance and controls
Track procurement KPIs (cost savings, lead time)
jobs.future_scope: High demand in manufacturing, retail, pharma, and tech. Path to SCM Director or CPO.

jobs.title: Logistics Manager
jobs.description: Oversees the transportation, distribution, and warehousing operations to ensure timely and cost-effective delivery of goods.
roles_responsibilities: Manage inbound and outbound logistics operations
Coordinate with 3PL and freight partners
Optimize delivery routes and transportation costs
Oversee warehouse operations and inventory accuracy
Track and improve logistics KPIs (OTD, freight cost)

alternative: 5+ Years in Logistics with Team Management

jobs.future_scope: High demand in e-commerce, FMCG, and manufacturing. Path to Head of Logistics or VP SCM.

jobs.title: Supply Chain Manager
jobs.description: Manages the end-to-end supply chain including demand planning, procurement, production, logistics, and distribution to optimize cost and service.
roles_responsibilities: Manage end-to-end supply chain operations
Drive demand and supply planning
Reduce supply chain costs and lead times
Manage supplier relationships and risks
Implement supply chain visibility tools

alternative: 7+ Years in Supply Chain with Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: SCM is critical across all manufacturing and distribution sectors. Growth path to VP SCM.

jobs.title: VP Supply Chain / Head of Supply Chain
jobs.description: Senior executive owning the entire supply chain strategy, driving efficiency, cost optimization, and resilience across global supply networks.
roles_responsibilities: Define multi-year supply chain strategy
Drive cost reduction and network optimization
Manage supply chain risk and resilience
Oversee procurement, logistics, and planning functions
Lead supply chain digital transformation

preferred: MBA Operations / SCM from Top Institute
alternative: 15+ Years in SCM with Senior Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: Path to COO or Chief Supply Chain Officer. Very high demand post-pandemic for resilient SCM leaders.

jobs.title: Sales Executive
jobs.description: Entry-level sales role focused on prospecting, client outreach, and closing deals to meet individual sales targets.
roles_responsibilities: Prospect and generate new leads
Conduct product demos and sales pitches
Manage sales pipeline and follow-ups
Meet monthly and quarterly sales targets
Maintain CRM records
jobs.future_scope: Fast-track career based on performance. Path to Senior Executive, Team Lead, and Sales Manager.

jobs.title: Sales Manager
jobs.description: Leads a team of sales executives, sets targets, coaches performance, and drives revenue growth across a region or product line.
roles_responsibilities: Manage and coach a team of sales executives
Set and monitor sales targets (monthly, quarterly, annual)
Drive new business acquisition and client retention
Develop sales strategies and go-to-market plans
Report on pipeline health and revenue forecasts

alternative: Strong Sales Track Record + Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: High demand across all industries. Path to Regional Sales Manager, VP Sales, and CSO.

jobs.title: Regional Sales Manager (RSM)
jobs.description: Oversees sales operations across a geographic region, managing multiple sales teams and driving regional revenue targets.
roles_responsibilities: Own revenue targets for the region
Manage a team of Sales Managers and Executives
Build and grow the regional client base
Develop channel and distribution partners
Analyze regional sales data and report to national leadership
jobs.future_scope: Pathway to National Sales Manager, VP Sales, or Chief Sales Officer.

jobs.title: National Sales Manager (NSM)
jobs.description: Heads the sales function across the entire country, managing a large distributed sales force and owning national revenue targets.
roles_responsibilities: Own national revenue and growth targets
Manage Regional Sales Managers
Define national go-to-market strategy
Build and manage key account relationships
Develop channel partner and distribution network

alternative: 15+ Years in Sales with National-Level Experience

jobs.future_scope: Path to VP Sales or Chief Sales Officer in large organizations.

jobs.title: VP Sales / Chief Sales Officer (CSO)
jobs.description: Top sales executive driving the entire revenue strategy, managing a large sales organization, and reporting to the CEO.
roles_responsibilities: Own company-wide revenue and growth strategy
Build and scale the sales organization
Drive enterprise and key account acquisition
Develop incentive and compensation structures
Present revenue forecasts to board and investors

preferred: MBA from IIM / ISB / Tier-1 Global School
alternative: Proven Track Record as NSM / VP Sales

jobs.future_scope: Top of sales career. CSOs often move to CEO or board roles.

jobs.title: Key Account Manager (KAM)
jobs.description: Manages and grows relationships with the company's most strategic, high-revenue clients through consultative selling and long-term partnership development.
roles_responsibilities: Own and grow revenue from key accounts
Develop deep relationships with client stakeholders
Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities
Coordinate with delivery, operations, and product teams
Create account development plans
jobs.future_scope: KAMs are critical in B2B, SaaS, pharma, and enterprise sales. Path to Senior KAM or Sales Manager.

jobs.title: IT Manager
jobs.description: Manages IT infrastructure, systems, and support teams to ensure technology reliability, security, and alignment with business needs.
roles_responsibilities: Manage IT infrastructure and operations
Oversee helpdesk and IT support teams
Ensure cybersecurity and data protection
Manage IT budgets and vendor contracts
Plan and execute IT projects
jobs.future_scope: IT Managers are in demand across all sectors. Path to IT Director or CTO.

jobs.title: Engineering Manager
jobs.description: Leads software engineering teams, manages delivery, coaches engineers, and balances technical and people leadership responsibilities.
roles_responsibilities: Lead and manage engineering teams (8-15 engineers)
Own sprint delivery and quality
Hire, mentor, and grow engineering talent
Collaborate with Product Managers on roadmap
Remove blockers and drive technical excellence

alternative: Strong Engineering Track Record + Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: Engineering Managers are among the highest paid in tech. Path to Director of Engineering or CTO.

jobs.title: Director of Engineering
jobs.description: Oversees multiple engineering teams and managers, drives technical roadmap, and bridges engineering with business strategy.
roles_responsibilities: Manage a portfolio of engineering teams
Define engineering OKRs and technical strategy
Collaborate with CPO and VP Product on roadmap
Drive organizational engineering culture
Hire and develop Engineering Managers

alternative: 10+ Years Engineering with Management Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Direct path to VP Engineering or CTO. Extremely high compensation in product companies.

jobs.title: VP Engineering
jobs.description: Senior engineering executive responsible for all engineering delivery, technical direction, and building a world-class engineering organization.
roles_responsibilities: Own all engineering delivery and technical roadmap
Build and scale engineering organization
Drive technical strategy aligned with business goals
Partner with CPO and CEO on product-engineering alignment
Manage engineering budget and vendor relationships

alternative: Proven Director of Engineering Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Clear path to CTO. VPs of Engineering are the most sought-after executives in the tech industry.

jobs.title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)
jobs.description: The top technology executive, responsible for all technology strategy, innovation, engineering, and aligning tech with the company's vision.
roles_responsibilities: Define and own the technology vision and roadmap
Lead all engineering, data, and infrastructure teams
Drive technology innovation and R&D
Represent technology to board and investors
Build and scale the technical organization

preferred: M.Tech / PhD / MS from Top Global University
alternative: Proven VP Engineering or Technical Founder Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Top of the technology career ladder. CTOs often move to CEO, CTO-in-Residence, or VC roles.

jobs.title: IT Director
jobs.description: Leads the IT department for a large organization, overseeing infrastructure, security, enterprise systems, and IT governance.
roles_responsibilities: Own IT strategy and governance for the organization
Manage IT infrastructure, security, and enterprise applications
Lead IT teams across helpdesk, network, and systems
Drive digital transformation and cloud adoption
Manage IT budget and vendor contracts
jobs.future_scope: Path to CIO or CTO. Critical in large enterprises, BFSI, and government organizations.

jobs.title: Chief Information Officer (CIO)
jobs.description: The top IT executive, responsible for all information technology systems, data governance, and digital strategy across the enterprise.
roles_responsibilities: Own enterprise IT strategy and digital transformation
Manage all IT systems, infrastructure, and data
Drive cybersecurity and data governance
Report to CEO and board on technology investments
Align IT investments with business strategy

preferred: MBA IT or MBA from Tier-1

jobs.future_scope: CIOs are increasingly strategic. Path to CEO of tech-first companies or board advisor.

jobs.title: Advertising & Promotions Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate advertising policies and programs or produce collateral materials such as posters, contests, coupons, or giveaways to create extra interest in the purchase of a product or service.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and oversee advertising campaigns across digital and offline media
Coordinate with creative agencies and media buying teams
Develop promotional strategies and go-to-market plans
Manage advertising budgets and measure ROI
Align promotional activities with brand and product strategy

alternative: 4-6 Years in Advertising or Marketing Roles

jobs.future_scope: Digital advertising is growing rapidly in India. Strong path to VP Marketing or CMO.

jobs.title: Public Relations Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for an organization, company, or client.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute PR strategies and media plans
Manage relationships with journalists, influencers, and media houses
Draft press releases, speeches, and official communications
Handle crisis communication and reputation management
Coordinate internal and external communications

alternative: 4+ Years in PR or Corporate Communications

jobs.future_scope: PR is critical for brand equity in the digital age. Path to Head of Communications or VP Corporate Affairs.

jobs.title: Administrative Services Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate one or more administrative services of an organization, such as records management, mail distribution, facilities, printing, and payroll.
roles_responsibilities: Oversee administrative functions including facilities, mail, printing, and office services
Develop and enforce administrative policies and procedures
Manage administrative budgets and vendor contracts
Coordinate office space planning and maintenance
Supervise administrative support staff

alternative: 2-4 Years in Administrative or Office Management Roles

jobs.future_scope: Stable demand in large corporates, government, and BPO. Path to Operations Manager.

jobs.title: Facilities Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate operations and functionalities of facilities and buildings. Oversees maintenance, security, space planning, and building services.
roles_responsibilities: Manage building maintenance, repairs, and services
Oversee facility security, housekeeping, and safety
Coordinate space allocation and office planning
Manage facilities budget and vendor contracts
Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations

alternative: 2-4 Years in Facilities or Property Management

jobs.future_scope: High demand in IT parks, real estate, hospitals, and corporates. Path to VP Facilities or COO.

jobs.title: Security Manager
jobs.description: Direct an organization's security functions, including physical security, safety of employees and facilities, and security policy enforcement.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and implement physical security policies and procedures
Manage security personnel and third-party security vendors
Conduct risk assessments and security audits
Oversee CCTV, access control, and incident management systems
Ensure compliance with safety and security regulations

alternative: 4-6 Years in Security or Law Enforcement

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand in IT campuses, manufacturing, retail chains, and banking. Path to Head of Security.

jobs.title: Treasurer / Controller
jobs.description: Direct financial activities such as planning, procurement, and investments for all or part of an organization. Manages treasury operations, cash flow, and financial controls.
roles_responsibilities: Manage treasury operations and cash flow planning
Oversee financial controls and accounting policies
Manage banking relationships and debt instruments
Prepare financial statements and statutory reports
Ensure tax compliance and statutory filings (GST, TDS, ROC)

alternative: 6-8 Years in Finance with Treasury/Controllership Experience

jobs.future_scope: Critical role in large enterprises and listed companies. Path to CFO.

jobs.title: Investment Fund Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate investment strategy or operations for a large pool of liquid assets such as mutual funds, pension funds, or hedge funds.
roles_responsibilities: Manage investment portfolio and asset allocation strategy
Analyze market trends, securities, and investment opportunities
Make buy/sell decisions based on research and mandates
Report portfolio performance to investors and stakeholders
Ensure compliance with SEBI and regulatory guidelines

alternative: 8-10 Years in Asset Management or Investment Research

jobs.future_scope: High demand in AMCs, PMS providers, hedge funds, and family offices. Path to CIO.

jobs.title: Industrial Production Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the work activities and resources necessary for manufacturing products in accordance with cost, quality, and production specifications.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and schedule manufacturing production activities
Manage production teams and allocate resources
Monitor quality, cost, and output KPIs
Identify and implement process improvements on the shop floor
Coordinate with procurement, maintenance, and quality teams

alternative: 1-5 Years in Manufacturing with Supervisory Experience

jobs.future_scope: Core role in manufacturing. Path to Plant Manager, VP Manufacturing, or COO.

jobs.title: Quality Control Systems Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate quality assurance programs. Formulate quality control policies and control quality of laboratory and production efforts.
roles_responsibilities: Design and manage Quality Management Systems (QMS)
Lead quality audits and certifications (ISO, IATF, etc.)
Analyze quality data and implement corrective actions
Train production teams on quality standards
Ensure product compliance with industry and regulatory standards

alternative: 4-6 Years in Quality Management with Certification

jobs.future_scope: Critical in pharma, automotive, aerospace, and FMCG. Path to Head of Quality or VP Quality.

jobs.title: Construction Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate construction projects including residential, commercial, and infrastructure builds. Manages contractors, timelines, budgets, and compliance.
roles_responsibilities: Oversee all phases of construction projects from planning to handover
Manage contractors, subcontractors, and site teams
Track project budget, schedule, and quality
Ensure compliance with building codes and safety regulations
Coordinate with architects, engineers, and clients
jobs.future_scope: India's infrastructure boom creates massive demand. Path to Project Director or VP Construction.

jobs.title: Education Administrator (School / K-12)
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate academic, administrative, and auxiliary activities of schools from kindergarten through secondary level.
roles_responsibilities: Manage school operations, staff, and academic programs
Develop and implement curriculum and assessment policies
Oversee student admissions, attendance, and welfare
Build relationships with parents, community, and regulatory bodies
Manage school budget, facilities, and resources

alternative: 2-4 Years as Senior Teacher or Department Head

jobs.future_scope: India's growing private school sector creates demand. Path to Principal or Director of Education.

jobs.title: Education Administrator (Higher Education / University)
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate student instruction, administration, and services in universities, colleges, and other postsecondary institutions.
roles_responsibilities: Manage academic departments, faculty, and programs
Oversee student admissions, registrar, and examination processes
Develop academic policies and curriculum standards
Manage research programs and partnerships
Handle accreditation, NAAC, and regulatory compliance
jobs.future_scope: NEP 2020 is transforming higher education in India. Path to Dean, Registrar, or Vice Chancellor.

jobs.title: Architectural & Engineering Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in architecture, engineering, or research and development. Manages technical teams and projects in design and engineering domains.
roles_responsibilities: Lead engineering or architecture project teams
Define technical standards, design guidelines, and review processes
Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources
Coordinate between clients, design teams, and contractors
Drive R&D initiatives and innovation programs

alternative: 10+ Years in Engineering with Leadership Experience

jobs.future_scope: High demand in infrastructure, EPC, R&D, and tech companies. Path to VP Engineering or Technical Director.

jobs.title: Hotel / Lodging Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of an organization or department that provides lodging and other accommodations, including rooms, food, and guest services.
roles_responsibilities: Manage day-to-day hotel or lodging operations
Oversee front desk, housekeeping, F&B, and maintenance teams
Drive guest satisfaction and handle escalations
Manage hotel budgets, pricing, and revenue targets
Coordinate with sales and marketing to maximize occupancy

alternative: 2-4 Years in Hotel Operations with Supervisory Role

jobs.future_scope: India's tourism sector is growing rapidly. Path to GM Hotel, Area Manager, or VP Operations.

jobs.title: Medical & Health Services Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate medical and health services in hospitals, clinics, managed care organizations, or public health agencies.
roles_responsibilities: Manage clinical and administrative operations of healthcare facilities
Ensure regulatory compliance (NABH, NABL, clinical protocols)
Oversee staffing, budgets, and resource allocation
Drive patient satisfaction and quality improvement programs
Coordinate between departments: clinical, lab, pharmacy, admin
jobs.future_scope: India's healthcare sector is among the fastest growing. Path to CEO of Hospital or Healthcare Network.

jobs.title: Real Estate & Property Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the selling, buying, leasing, or governance activities of commercial, industrial, or residential properties.
roles_responsibilities: Manage residential or commercial property portfolios
Oversee tenant relations, lease agreements, and rent collection
Coordinate maintenance, renovation, and facility services
Identify and evaluate new property investment opportunities
Ensure legal and regulatory compliance in property transactions

alternative: 4-6 Years in Real Estate with Portfolio Management Experience

jobs.future_scope: Real estate is one of India's largest sectors. Path to Head of Real Estate or VP Asset Management.

jobs.title: Emergency Management Director
jobs.description: Plan and direct disaster response or crisis management activities, provide disaster preparedness training, and prepare emergency plans and procedures.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain organizational emergency response plans
Coordinate crisis response across departments during incidents
Conduct emergency drills and preparedness training
Liaise with government agencies and emergency services
Assess risks and implement business continuity measures
jobs.future_scope: Growing importance in large corporates, government, and manufacturing. Path to Chief Risk Officer or COO.

jobs.title: Regulatory Affairs Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate production activities to ensure compliance with regulations and standards in industries such as pharma, BFSI, food, and tech.
roles_responsibilities: Ensure organization's compliance with industry regulations
Prepare and submit regulatory filings and dossiers
Monitor regulatory changes and update internal policies
Liaise with SEBI, RBI, CDSCO, FSSAI, or other regulators
Train teams on compliance obligations and regulatory updates

alternative: 2-4 Years in Regulatory Affairs in Pharma, BFSI, or Tech

jobs.future_scope: Critical in pharma, biotech, fintech, and food sectors. Path to VP Regulatory or Chief Compliance Officer.

jobs.title: Compliance Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of an organization to ensure compliance with ethical or regulatory standards, including internal policies, laws, and industry codes.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain the compliance framework and policies
Conduct compliance audits and risk assessments
Ensure adherence to applicable laws (Companies Act, SEBI, RBI, GDPR)
Investigate compliance violations and recommend corrective actions
Train employees on compliance policies and ethics

alternative: 2-4 Years in Legal, Risk, or Audit Functions

jobs.future_scope: Compliance is mandatory across BFSI, pharma, and tech. Path to Chief Compliance Officer or General Counsel.

jobs.title: Loss Prevention Manager
jobs.description: Plan and direct policies, procedures, or systems to prevent the loss of assets due to theft, fraud, damage, or shrinkage. Common in retail and BFSI.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and implement loss prevention policies and controls
Investigate internal and external theft, fraud, and shrinkage cases
Conduct store audits and vulnerability assessments
Train staff on loss prevention procedures
Analyze loss data and report to management

alternative: 4-6 Years in Retail Operations or Security Management

jobs.future_scope: In demand in retail chains, BFSI, and e-commerce. Path to Head of Loss Prevention or Security Director.

jobs.title: Social & Community Service Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the activities of a social service program or community outreach organization, including NGOs, CSR teams, and social enterprises.
roles_responsibilities: Manage community programs and social initiatives
Develop and oversee program budgets and resource allocation
Build partnerships with government, donors, and communities
Monitor program impact and prepare donor reports
Lead and coordinate teams of social workers and volunteers

alternative: 4-6 Years in NGO or CSR Program Management

jobs.future_scope: Growing CSR mandates and NGO sector. Path to Director of Programs or Executive Director.

jobs.title: Clinical Research Coordinator / Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate clinical research projects. Manages clinical trials, ethical compliance, data collection, and research team activities.
roles_responsibilities: Coordinate and manage clinical trial operations
Ensure compliance with ICH-GCP, CDSCO, and IRB guidelines
Manage data collection, entry, and quality review
Liaise with sponsors, CROs, and investigators
Prepare regulatory documents and trial master files

alternative: 1-2 Years in Clinical Research or CRO with GCP Training

jobs.future_scope: India is a major hub for global clinical trials. Path to Clinical Project Manager or Head of Clinical Operations.

jobs.title: Chief Sustainability Officer (CSO)
jobs.description: Communicate and coordinate with management, shareholders, customers, and employees to address sustainability issues. Enacts or oversees a corporate ESG strategy.
roles_responsibilities: Define and lead the company's ESG and sustainability strategy
Drive carbon reduction, circular economy, and green initiatives
Manage sustainability reporting (GRI, BRSR, TCFD frameworks)
Engage investors, board, and regulators on ESG performance
Embed sustainability into supply chain and operations

alternative: 4-6 Years in ESG, Sustainability, or CSR Leadership

jobs.future_scope: Fastest growing C-suite role globally. SEBI's BRSR mandates are driving demand in India.

jobs.title: Entertainment & Recreation Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including sports clubs, multiplexes, resorts, and event venues.
roles_responsibilities: Manage operations of entertainment or recreation facilities
Plan and coordinate events, activities, and programs
Oversee staff, vendors, and facility maintenance
Drive membership, ticket sales, and revenue growth
Ensure guest safety and regulatory compliance

alternative: 2-4 Years in Events, Sports, or Hospitality Management

jobs.future_scope: Growing entertainment and sports industry in India. Path to General Manager or VP Operations.

jobs.title: Fundraising Manager
jobs.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations through grants, donor engagement, and campaigns.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute fundraising campaigns and donor outreach
Identify and apply for government and CSR grants
Manage donor relationships and stewardship programs
Organize fundraising events and awareness campaigns
Track fundraising metrics and report to leadership

alternative: 2-4 Years in Fundraising, CSR, or NGO Sector

jobs.future_scope: India's growing NGO and social sector. Path to Executive Director or CSR Head.
